data.failure_message: API quota exceeded: You have exceeded the HubSpot API rate limit. Your request for daily data has been rate limited (10000 requests/day). Please wait 24 hours or upgrade your HubSpot plan.
data.message:
Fivetran sync failure
Connector: hubspot_crm
Schema: hubspot
Error Code: API_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
Details: HubSpot API responded with HTTP 429 Too Many Requests after 10000 calls in current billing period.
Affected tables: contacts, deals, companies, engagements
Last successful sync: 2024-06-14T04:30:00Z
